---
title: "Software"
---

## [<i class="bi bi-github"></i>](https://github.com/lipiecki/PostForecasts.jl) PostForecasts.jl
[![PostForecasts.jl](https://github.com/lipiecki/PostForecasts.jl/raw/main/docs/src/images/banner.png?raw=true)](https://github.com/lipiecki/PostForecasts.jl)
Julia package that turns point predictions into probablilistic forecasts.

```zsh
pkg> add PostForecasts
```

## [<i class="bi bi-github"></i>](https://github.com/lipiecki/lassoquantreg) lassoquantreg
A simple Python package based on scikit-learn and optuna that provides automatic selection of the best lasso quantile regression model.

```zsh
pip install git+https://github.com/lipiecki/lassoquantreg.git
```
